# BacksterOS documentation index
# Workspace: ~/code/backsteros/
# For AI agents: load AGENTS.md first, then fetch only the docs relevant to your task.

> Code subfolders: backsteros-api/, backsteros-app/, backsteros-admin/, backsteros-mobile/, backsteros-desktop/, backsteros-packages/

## Entry points

- [STRUCTURE.md](../STRUCTURE.md): Folder map under ~/code/
- [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md): Primary agent entry — rules, task→doc map, phase gate
- [README.md](../README.md): Human overview

## Specifications

- [docs/00-vision.md](00-vision.md): Goals, users, non-goals, success criteria
- [docs/01-architecture.md](01-architecture.md): System diagram, repos, auth, write pipeline
- [docs/02-tech-stack.md](02-tech-stack.md): Tool choices — Expo, Tauri, Postgres, PowerSync, Meilisearch, Hono
- [docs/03-data-model.md](03-data-model.md): Sync tiers A/B/C/D, entities, version fields
- [docs/04-api-and-sync.md](04-api-and-sync.md): REST v1, sync bootstrap/pull/push, live documents, agent API
- [docs/05-clients.md](05-clients.md): Product app, ops admin, mobile, desktop
- [docs/11-urls-and-routing.md](11-urls-and-routing.md): /app vs /admin, reverse proxy
- [docs/06-storage-and-search.md](06-storage-and-search.md): B2/R2, Meilisearch, PDF/markdown layout
- [docs/07-performance.md](07-performance.md): iPhone 16, M1 MacBook, lightweight rules
- [docs/08-legacy-circle.md](08-legacy-circle.md): Circle monolith reference, migration notes
- [docs/09-phased-build-plan.md](09-phased-build-plan.md): Implementation phases 0–9
- [docs/10-decisions-log.md](10-decisions-log.md): ADRs — Convex rejected, PowerSync accepted, etc.

## Task routing (quick)

| If you are working on… | Read |
| --- | --- |
| Starting implementation | 00-vision, 01-architecture, 09-phased-build-plan |
| API routes / OpenAPI | 04-api-and-sync, 03-data-model, 02-tech-stack |
| PowerSync / offline | 03-data-model, 04-api-and-sync, 07-performance |
| Expo mobile | 05-clients, 07-performance, 04-api-and-sync |
| Tauri desktop | 05-clients, 07-performance, 10-decisions-log (ADR-019) |
| PDFs / markdown / search | 06-storage-and-search, 03-data-model |
| Agent + human doc editing | 04-api-and-sync (Live documents section) |
| Migrating from Circle | 08-legacy-circle, 09-phased-build-plan Phase 8 |
| Changing stack choices | 10-decisions-log, 02-tech-stack |

## Related codebases (outside workspace)

- ~/code/circle.remondevries.com — legacy monolith (reference only)
- ~/code/backsteros-agent — agent console (separate product)

## Conventions

- Do not scaffold app code until user approves Phase 1
- Never bulk-sync Tier C/D content to clients
- All writes: storage → Postgres version → sync event → Meilisearch → realtime
